title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 26 - 2017: Classical Greek Books

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs late at night about his internet outage being fixed (broken motor on the modem), a family dinner with his mom and brothers, and his main focus: building out a website cataloging classical books from the ancient/Western world, particularly works related to Rome (Mommsen, theater, buildings of Rome), with excitement about his faster internet allowing rapid progress on the project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited about faster speeds enabling quicker video uploads and website work
very enthusiastic, wants to catalog every surviving book from the Western world up to around 700 AD
really enjoyed them, especially the nut sauce dipping sauce

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle ran out of internet because his motor broke and had to wait for a new one.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle picked up the new motor from the hardware store and hooked up his internet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The lady at the hardware store said the new motor would provide faster internet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle uploaded a video after fixing his internet and is excited to see how it works.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's mom came by and took the old motor to the UPS place to send it back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's mom invited him over for dinner with his brother.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: They had Trader Joe's wraps with veggies and nut sauce for dinner.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle offered to let his brother borrow his motorbike because Ridgeway, Colorado is a great place for motorbiking.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle needs to sell his van, and someone was interested last week but didn't call back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's video battery died, and then his memory card filled up, delaying his video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had to fix a metal thing that holds the curtains up in his van.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle has been archiving books from the classic world and wants to add photos of them.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle rebuilt the book 'The Rainbow Crystal' and is working on other classic books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is compiling a collection of buildings from the realm and wants to publish it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is building menus for his website and organizing books by name.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's fast computer is helping him archive books quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle aims to have every book from the Western world up until 700 AD archived in two weeks.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle is excited to finish his project and might jump into it soon.

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log. Right now it's 2.42 in the morning on May 27th, so I'll call this for May 26th.
Okay. Was that weed? Did I just blow out smoke from yawning?
Because when I saw smoke... I'm pretty high right now. Maybe I'm just listening.
Maybe I'll look at the video and see if I can see it.
So I got out of the rhythm of doing videos the other day because I ran out of Internet.
I was doing... and then all of a sudden no Internet, so I called and it turned out my modem broke.
And so I had to...
Wait for the new one to come.
And so it didn't come on the 24th.
So on the morning of the 25th, I called and they said,
Oh yeah, this morning it just came into your, you know, the drop-off place for UPS.
And so I went down to the hardware store and picked it up and then hooked up my Internet.
And the lady said it was a different modem and she said, I'm going to have faster Internet now because it's a new modem.
So I'm excited.
And I, yeah, I haven't detected any problems.
I haven't uploaded a video since then.
So yeah, I'll find out now how it works.
So I'm excited to think that'd be cool if it just uploads.
Usually it would take, like, if I do a five-minute long video talking, you know, to have people in the background or whatever.
It would take, like, it could take, like, all day because, you know, it wouldn't upload.
Like, get up in the morning and it would likely get stuck, you know.
So anyway, and that's it being hardwired.
But anyway, so, yeah, and so I didn't, that was yesterday and I didn't do another one because, because, yesterday, because I was just hooked on my project.
And then that's why I'm not doing it until now.
And so today I got up, I was working until, like, five, like six yesterday.
And then I got up at, like, noon, you know, so I got, like, six hours of sleep.
But I felt good.
And then my mom came by and I gave her the box to bring it to the UPS place to send back my old modem, which is only, like, a year old.
And she invited me over for dinner because my brothers were there.
And we had, she got these, I guess, at Trader Joe's, these, like, wraps and rice wrap with veggies on the inside.
And you put the sauce dip on it and it's really good.
Like, the nut sauce.
It's really good, man.
Oh, and then we had momos.
And then my brother was giving me beers because I offered to let him borrow my motorbike because he lives in Ridgeway, Colorado.
I know it's the best place to go motorbiking in the summer over in the mountains.
So we'll see if we can fit it in his van tomorrow.
Oh, yeah, I still need to sell my van.
Somebody was interested in last week, but they didn't call back.
I didn't do a video about it.
Needs to do a video.
Yeah, I went out to do a video and the battery died.

And then the card filled up.
